nasb.text: The son of Uzzi was Izrahiah. And the sons of Izrahiah were Michael, Obadiah, Joel, Isshiah; all five of them were chief men.

esv.text: The son of Uzzi: Izrahiah. And the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah, all five of them were chief men.

cnv.text: 烏西的兒子是伊斯拉希，伊斯拉希的兒子是米迦勒、俄巴底亞，約珥和伊示雅，共五人，都是各家族的首領。

ccb.text: 乌西的儿子是伊斯拉希。伊斯拉希的儿子是米迦勒、俄巴底亚、约珥、伊示雅，他们五人都是族长。
